level.description: Protection level. strict: block all risky actions; balanced: block dangerous, confirm risky; permissive: only block critical threats.

auto_scan.description: Scan all installed skills for security vulnerabilities on session start.

metrics.description: Telemetry/metrics collection settings. Disabled when both endpoint and log are empty.

endpoint.description: Backend URL to POST metric payloads to.

api_key.description: Bearer token for metrics endpoint authentication.

timeout.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for metrics POST.

log.description: Path to local JSONL file for metric payloads. Supports ~/ prefix.
